Bob Dylan
Vorst Nationaal
Brussels, Belgium
17 june 1998

A zimmy21 recording !! 

Sound quality : Excellent  / 3 samples in comments .

Comment : A new seed by request .

Lineage : AKG Stereo mics > Sony Dat TCD-D8 > Pioneer CD Recorder > PC > EAC > wav > Traders Little Helper >  flac

Size : 642 Mb

Disc 01 : 

01. Leopard-skin pill-box hat
02. License to kill
03. Cold irons bound
04. Tears of rage
05. Silvio
06. Mama, you been on my mind
07. Ballad of Hollis Brown
08. Mr. Tambourine man
09. Tangled up in blue


Disc 02 :

01. Make you feel my love
02. Can't wait
03. I don't believe you
04. Highway 61 revisited
05. Forever young
06. Love sick
07. Rainy day women # 12 & 35
08. Blowin' in the wind
